actionCalls.name: Send_Email_Action_ENTERPRISE_SIMULATION_ElectroMagnetic
actionCalls.label: Send Email Action ENTERPRISE | SIMULATION ElectroMagnetic

actionCalls.name: Send_Email_Action_ENTERPRISE_SIMULATION_ElectroMagnetic_Update
actionCalls.label: Send Email Action ENTERPRISE | SIMULATION ElectroMagnetic Update

decisions.name: Attach_files_In_Received_Through_WEB_Form
decisions.label: Attach files In Received Through WEB Form

rules.name: Case_WebForm_Phone_Email
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 5) AND (4 OR (5 AND 6)) AND 7
rules.label: Case : Web Form/Phone/Email

decisions.name: Send_Email_On_Update_ENTERPRISE_SIMULATION_ElectroMagnetic
decisions.label: Send Email On Update - ENTERPRISE | SIMULATION ElectroMagnetic

rules.name: Send_Email_For_Simuliation_On_Update
rules.label: Send Email For Simuliation On Update

formulas.name: f_HolidayMessageBlock
setTheClosestBusinessDate
formulas.expression: CASE( MOD(TODAY() + 1 - DATE(1900, 1, 7), 7), 0, TODAY() + 3, 6, TODAY() + 2, TODAY() + 1 )

Flow.interviewLabel: Case Record Update And Insert Flow {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Case : After Insert And Update Flow

value.stringValue: Call the client at the start of the next business day

recordLookups.name: Get_HARDWARE_Emerald_Diamond_Care_Process
recordLookups.label: Get HARDWARE: Emerald & Diamond Care Process

recordLookups.name: Get_New_Case_Automation_Switch_Setting
recordLookups.label: Get New Case Automation Switch Setting

recordLookups.name: Get_New_Case_Automation_Switch_Setting_Record
recordLookups.label: Get New Case Automation Switch Setting Record

textTemplates.name: AssignmentEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
A {!$Record.Priority} ticket {!$Record.CaseNumber} by {!$Record.Contact.FirstName} {!$Record.Contact.LastName} from {!$Record.Account.Name} has been received. It is unassigned.


Review it by following the link below: https://trimech12345.lightning.force.com/{!$Record.Id}

textTemplates.name: GroupEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
A {!$Record.Priority} ticket has been assigned to your Group {!$Record.CaseNumber}.  Please make sure to review and support within the priority requirements.


To review the status of the ticket and add updates, follow the link below: https://trimech12345--trimechuat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/{!$Record.Id}

textTemplates.name: newCaseEmailBody
textTemplates.text:
{!fGreeting}

Thank you for reaching out. A new case has been created with the Case Number: {!$Record.CaseNumber}.


Our team will be in contact with you shortly to assist with your request.

{!f_HolidayMessageBlock}


Thank you,

The TriMech Team

textTemplates.name: newCaseEmailQueue
textTemplates.text:
Hi Team,

Please review the case that is currently assigned to the queue and is present in the following list view:

List: ENTERPRISE | SIMULATION ElectroMagnetic,

Case Number: {!$Record.CaseNumber},

Thank you,
The TriMech Team
